zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Hill於1635年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克比德福德時，他的父親Peter FitzRobert Hill31歲，母親Mary Hill28歲。他於1658年11月1日與Mary Cross在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1657年住在美國緬因州阿盧斯圖可卡利布曼恩。他去世於1693年8月26日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼威爾斯享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Hill于1635年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克比德福德时，他的父亲Peter FitzRobert Hill31岁，母亲Mary Hill28岁。他于1658年11月1日与Mary Cross在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1657年住在美国缅因州阿盧斯圖可卡利布曼恩。他去世于1693年8月26日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼威爾斯享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Hill was born in 1635, in Biddeford, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Peter FitzRobert Hill, was 31 and his mother, Mary Hill, was 28. He married Mary Cross on 1 November 1658, in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He lived in Maine, Caribou, Aroostook, Maine, United States in 1657. He died on 26 August 1693, in Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Hill est né en 1635, à Biddeford, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Peter FitzRobert Hill, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mary Hill, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Mary Cross le 1 novembre 1658, à Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il a vécu à Maine, Caribou, Aroostook, Maine, États-Unis en 1657. Il est décédé le 26 août 1693, à Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Hill 1635 in Biddeford, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Peter FitzRobert Hill 31 und seine Mutter Mary Hill 28. Er hat am 1. November 1658 in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Mary Cross geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1657 hat er in Maine, Caribou, Aroostook, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 26. August 1693 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Hill è nato il nel 1635 nel Biddeford, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Peter FitzRobert Hill, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Mary Hill, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Mary Cross il 1 novembre 1658, nel Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Vissuto a Maine, Caribou, Aroostook, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1657. Morì il 26 agosto 1693, nel Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Hillが1635年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークビッドエフォードで生まれた時，父Peter FitzRobert Hillは31歳，母Mary Hillは28歳であった。1658年11月1日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーでMary Crossと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1657年にはアメリカ合衆国メイン州アルーストオクカーイボウメインに住んでいた。彼は1693年8月26日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーウエルズで58歳で死去した。

ko.Maine Colony, Maine, United States: 미국 메인 주 아루스투크 카리보우 맹

ko.Wells, York, Province of Maine, Massachu: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 웰스
ko.lifeSummary: Roger Hill(이)가 1635년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 비데퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peter FitzRobert Hill(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Hill(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1658년 11월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이에서 Mary Cross(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1657년도에 미국 메인 주 아루스투크 카리보우 맹에서 살았다. 그는 1693년 8월 26일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 웰스에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Hill nasceu em 1635, em Biddeford, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Peter FitzRobert Hill, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mary Hill, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Cross em 1 de novembro de 1658, em Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele viveu em Maine, Caribou, Aroostook, Maine, Estados Unidos da América em 1657. Ele faleceu em 26 de agosto de 1693, em Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Hill родился в 1635 г. в местности биддефорд, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Peter FitzRobert Hill было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mary Hill, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Cross 1 ноября 1658 г. в местности массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он жил в местности меин, карибоу, арустук, Мэн, Соединенные штаты в 1657 году. Он умер 26 августа 1693 г. в местности веллс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 58 лет.
